evals.prompt: How should I design Redis keys for a multi-tenant application?
evals.expected_output: Recommends colon-separated namespacing (app:tenant:resource:id). Keep keys descriptive but compact. Set TTL on all non-permanent keys.

evals.prompt: How do I safely delete 10,000 Redis keys matching a pattern?
evals.expected_output: Use SCAN instead of KEYS (KEYS is O(N) and blocks). Use UNLINK instead of DEL for background deletion of large keys.

evals.prompt: What Redis eviction policy should I use for a general cache?
evals.expected_output: Recommends allkeys-lru for general caches. volatile-lru for mixed workloads with persistent data. Mentions enabling lazy freeing.

should_not_trigger: How do I create a PostgreSQL migration?
How do I design a MongoDB schema?
How do I implement JWT authentication in NestJS?
